concept: Please craft a game where gravity shifts direction every time the player character jumps. Each landing locks gravity in the new direction until the next jump, requiring careful planning of movement sequences. The environment is designed with this mechanic in mind, featuring puzzles that can only be solved through creative gravity manipulation. Special platforms modify jump properties, such as increasing height or adding horizontal momentum. Players must navigate through an enormous abandoned space station to restart its core systems before orbital decay causes it to crash into the planet below.
